visual_findings.label: Facial Expression
visual_findings.summary: Neutral to slightly tired expression; minimal emotional reactivity.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient maintains steady eye contact with camera; facial muscles show no signs of distress, agitation, or apathy; occasional slight head tilt and eye movement during speech.

visual_findings.label: Gaze and Attention
visual_findings.summary: Consistent visual focus on camera; no signs of disengagement or wandering attention.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient looks directly at camera throughout most of the clip; brief glances away occur but are brief and contextually consistent with speech production.

body_findings.label: Posture and Movement
body_findings.summary: Stable seated posture; minimal fidgeting or restlessness.
body_findings.evidence: Patient remains seated in chair; only one brief hand-to-head gesture observed; no signs of tremor, rigidity, or uncontrolled movement.

voice_findings.label: Speech Fluency
voice_findings.summary: Speech is fluent, with natural pacing and pauses; no evidence of word-finding difficulty or disorganized syntax.
voice_findings.evidence: Patient speaks in complete sentences with appropriate prosody; no hesitations, repetitions, or substitutions observed.

voice_findings.label: Voice Quality
voice_findings.summary: Voice is clear and steady; no signs of tremor, hoarseness, or breathiness.
voice_findings.evidence: Audio is clean; pitch and volume remain consistent throughout the clip.

content_findings.label: Self-Reported Routine
content_findings.summary: Patient describes daily routine including breakfast, work, and self-care without indication of confusion or memory deficit.
content_findings.evidence: Patient states: 'I wake up and I prepare myself a breakfast... I'm working from 10 a.m. till now... I do it myself, nobody is taking care of me.'

content_findings.label: Task Description
content_findings.summary: Patient describes professional activity (DDoS testing) with appropriate terminology and context.
content_findings.evidence: Patient mentions 'DDoS testing' and 'Qingming Festival' with correct contextual usage, indicating awareness of current events and professional domain.

screening_summary: The patient demonstrates coherent speech, stable gaze, appropriate affect, and accurate self-report of daily activities and professional tasks. No observable signs of cognitive impairment or emotional dysregulation are present in this single clip.
evidence_against_risk: Fluent, coherent speech without disfluencies or word-finding errors
Accurate self-description of routine and professional context
alternative_explanations: The patient may be in a relaxed, familiar environment (home) which reduces stress and enhances performance.
The clip may not capture a full range of cognitive or behavioral domains necessary for comprehensive screening.
emotional_assessment_findings: Neutral affect with minimal emotional expression
No signs of distress, anxiety, or apathy
risk_control_suggestions: Consider routine follow-up if other domains (e.g., memory, executive function) are of concern in future assessments.
visit_recommendation: Routine follow-up or no further action at this time.
future_risk_trend_summary: Insufficient data to predict future cognitive decline from a single clip.
context_notes: This is a single-clinic screening video; no longitudinal or multi-modal data available.
Patient self-reports independence in daily activities, which is reassuring for functional cognition.
disclaimer: Research demo only. This output is not a diagnosis and must not be used as a standalone medical decision.
